phase-summary.outcome: Model Schema Viewer now treats `(base)` as namespace-level context, supports editing feature-ref default values inline, and outputs representative per-language schema file lists that include inheritance and defaults.

file.description: Added parent-model resolution, chain-based schema file generation, namespace `(base)` selector, and inline feature default editing wired to overrides.

tests.test: Typecheck validates updated modal/store callback wiring and schema generation helpers.

next.action: Optional: include JSON/YAML export in the same file list to complete handoff formats.
